title: Magnetometer calibration workflow + always-on dark theme

requirements.summary: Add a complete magnetometer calibration workflow in the IMU Calibration tab and ensure calibrated magnetometer values are applied consistently to displays and MARG fusion.
acceptanceCriteria: In the Calibration tab, there is a dedicated Magnetometer calibration section with a clear start action, progress indication, and a way to cancel.
When magnetometer calibration completes, the computed calibration parameters are shown to the user (offsets and scales).
Magnetometer calibration can be reset back to defaults (offsets=0, scales=1) from the UI.
The calibrated magnetometer values are used consistently anywhere magnetometer data is displayed and anywhere magnetometer data is fed into the orientation filter when the magnetometer is available.
If the magnetometer is unavailable, the UI communicates that magnetometer calibration is disabled/unavailable and does not start calibration.

file_operations.description: Implement a dedicated Magnetometer calibration section inside the Calibration tab: (1) guard Start Calibration when magnetometer is unavailable (disable action + show clear unavailable messaging), (2) show calibration progress via the existing Progress component with Cancel, (3) on completion display computed offsets/scales, and (4) add a Reset-to-defaults action that sets mag calibration to offsets=0 and scales=1. Refactor magnetometer value rendering to use applyMagCalibration so displayed values match exactly what is used for MARG updates. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add/standardize exported magnetometer default calibration constants/helpers (e.g., a default MagCalibration object) and ensure applyMagCalibration/calibrateMagnetometer behavior supports the UI workflow (reset, display of offsets/scales) without duplicating magic values across components.

requirements.summary: Apply always-on dark theme styling across the app shell and ensure major surfaces consistently use dark theme tokens.
acceptanceCriteria: On every load, the app renders in dark mode regardless of system preference, with no in-app theme toggle exposed.
App shell surfaces (header, main background, cards, footer) use theme variables/classes so the UI is consistently dark and readable.
No prominent light-theme backgrounds remain in the main app layout; contrast meets typical dark UI readability expectations (text, borders, muted text).

file_operations.description: Confirm/strengthen always-on dark mode by ensuring the root element is forced into the 'dark' class on initial load (and no theme-toggle logic exists). Keep the approach consistent with Tailwind's class-based darkMode.

Adjust global base styling to ensure dark theme tokens are the effective defaults (e.g., ensure html/body surfaces reliably use bg-background/text-foreground under the forced 'dark' class) and that borders/muted text remain readable in dark mode.

Audit and update app shell layout surfaces (header/main/footer) to ensure all backgrounds, borders, and text rely exclusively on theme tokens (bg-background/bg-card/text-foreground/text-muted-foreground/border-border) so no light backgrounds remain prominent in dark mode.
